name: The Zen Diaries of Garry Shandling
original_name: The Zen Diaries of Garry Shandling
overview: The story of legendary comedian Garry Shandling, featuring interviews from nearly four dozen friends, family and colleagues; four decades’ worth of television appearances; and a lifetime of personal journals, private letters and home audio and video footage.

trailers.title: The Zen Diaries of Garry Shandling (2018) Official Trailer | HBO
